{{Missing Info|specifics=Source, Special Stats, Relic Resonances, Mirage name & final rewards, Mirage 1-3, Description}}
{{CargoRelic
|name=The Gate
|available=0
|rank=SSS
|affct=TECH
|source=Daily Pack Relic #46
|description=
|fame=70
|art=51
|fth=66
|civ=67
|tech=108
|ss1=Mecha Minion ATK +3%<br>Protomons assist Snail in battle, and deal extra DMG +240<br>Per TECH Bionic Part Extracted, Snail HP +150<br>TECH Bionic Part Extracted: 10/10
|ss2=Mecha Minion ATK +4%<br>Protomons assist Snail in battle, and deal extra DMG +320<br>Per TECH Bionic Part Extracted, Snail HP +200<br>TECH Bionic Part Extracted: 10/10
|ss3=Mecha Minion ATK +5%<br>Protomons assist Snail in battle, and deal extra DMG +400<br>Per TECH Bionic Part Extracted, Snail HP +250<br>TECH Bionic Part Extracted: 10/10
|ss4=Mecha Minion ATK +7%<br>Protomons assist Snail in battle, and deal extra DMG +560<br>Per TECH Bionic Part Extracted, Snail HP +350<br>TECH Bionic Part Extracted: 10/10
|ss5=Mecha Minion ATK +9%<br>Protomons assist Snail in battle, and deal extra DMG +720<br>Per TECH Bionic Part Extracted, Snail HP +450<br>TECH Bionic Part Extracted: 10/10
|ss6=Mecha Minion ATK +12%<br>Protomons assist Snail in battle, and deal extra DMG +960<br>Per TECH Bionic Part Extracted, Snail HP +600<br>TECH Bionic Part Extracted: 10/10
|ss7=Mecha Minion ATK +12%<br>Protomons assist Snail in battle, and deal extra DMG +960<br>Per TECH Bionic Part Extracted, Snail HP +600<br>TECH Bionic Part Extracted: 10/10<br>Protomons assist Snail in battle, and deal extra DMG +800 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Surfclam skill III.png|50px]] Place in Surf Clam Biozilla: In Species War, Troop Earth DMG +60
|skill2=[[File:Surfclam skill III.png|50px]] Place in Surf Clam Biozilla: In Species War, Troop DMG REDUC +6%
|skill3=[[File:Surfclam skill III.png|50px]] Place in Surf Clam Biozilla: In Species War, All Minion RUSH +9%
|mirage={{Mirage|name=|reward=
|3name=|3rec=|3atk=|3def=|3hp=|3weak=
|4name=|4rec=|4atk=|4def=|4hp=|4weak=
|5name=|5rec=|5atk=|5def=|5hp=|5weak=
|6name=|6rec=|6atk=|6def=|6hp=|6weak=
|Arec=|Aatk=|Adef=|Ahp=|Aweak=
}}
}}

[[Category:Surf Clam Biozilla Skill]]
[[Category:Mecha Minion ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Minion Skin Boost]]
[[Category:Minion ATK Boost]]
[[Category:Protomon Boost]]
[[Category:HP Boost]]
[[Category:Daily Pack Relics]]
